transcript: Good day, I'm Butler from Yahoo Builders. May I have your name, please? My name is Pranav Prakash. I want to buy a flat in Noida. Nice to meet you, Pranav. What type of unit are you looking for, EG? 2BHK, 3BHK, Villa. I'm looking for a four BHK. Could you confirm you mean a 4BHK flat? Also, may I know your budget range? Yes, I'm looking for a 4 BHK flat and my budget range is ₹40 lakh. Great, Pran F. When do you plan to move into or invest in your new home? I plan to move into my new home by the end of this year. Thanks, Pranav, for BHK in Noida, Rupee 40L budget moving by year end. I'll share suitable options shortly. Thank you, bye bye. You're welcome, Pranav. Have a wonderful day. Goodbye.
